---
title: "A Modern Method for Guitar"
date: "2024-10-08T15:01:23"
#date-modified: "2024-10-07T16:01:23"
format: 
  html: default
image: "../img/les.jpg"
categories:
  - 2024
  - Les Paul
  - Study
  - Scales
---

## Exercise 3

{{< video https://youtu.be/3jWbFmz7wkM >}}

## Exercise 2

{{< video https://youtu.be/7vjI5AKKMBM >}}

## Exercise 1

{{< video https://youtu.be/YW0-J1n9FWo >}}

{{< video https://youtu.be/oNw9rlxJdBk >}}

## Gibson Les Paul

Pickup Position: Bridge\
Master Volume: 2.5\
Master Tone: 2.5

## Joyo Tremolo

Intensity: 50%\
Rate: 50%

## Fender Blues Jr. III

Volume: 8.0\
Fat: OFF\
Treble: 6.5\
Bass: 6.0\
Middle: 6.0\
Master: 4.5\
Reverb: 5.0

## Blue Yeti

Gain: 9 o'clock\
Mode: Stereo, on desk near plant

## Lesson

{{< video https://youtu.be/xcftRG0kS_g?si=25OvTvnjob8ecxIH >}}
